pages.ocr_text: Priority: 2 - High: Production seriously impacted Subject: ACB System Down Description: Site reports under zone 5, they're unable to get a pair. AMR had a low battery level under the rack. Site replaced the AMR, and every AMR goes to the hospital. Resolution Details: Site removed robot 158, which was shown to not be mapped. After doing so, the ECB system was reported to be functional again. Additional Comments: Sincerely, FORTNA Technical Support Team ee

pages.ocr_clean_text: Priority: 2 - High: Production seriously impacted Subject: ACB System Down Description: Site reports under zone 5, they're unable to get a pair. AMR had a low battery level under the rack. Site replaced the AMR, and every AMR goes to the hospital. Resolution Details: Site removed robot 158, which was shown to not be mapped. After doing so, the ECB system was reported to be functional again. Additional Comments: Sincerely, FORTNA Technical Support Team ee

pages.ocr_clean_text: Priority: 2 - High: Production seriously impacted Subject: ACB System Down Description: Site reports under zone 5, they're unable to get a pair. AMR had a low battery level under the rack. Site replaced the AMR, and every AMR goes to the hospital. Resolution Details: Site removed robot 158, which was shown to not be mapped. After doing so, the ECB system was reported to be functional again. Additional Comments: Sincerely, FORTNA Technical Support Team ee
